All Work

Projects

A collection of things I've built, designed, and experimented with. Each one taught me something different.

Code

AuraSync

A background daemon that automates your local music library and syncs a live Discord presence. Runs silent, no UI.

TypeScript Python Spotify
View Case Study
Code

OmniShell

A terminal messaging client written in Rust. Sends encrypted messages across 7 network protocols — including Tor, Bluetooth, and LoRa — depending on what's available.

Rust Cryptography P2P
View Case Study
Code

NBTHotbar

A collection of Minecraft NBT exploit files for testing server behavior. Documented, educational, comes with warnings.

Minecraft NBT Java Edition
View Case Study
AI

QuickCmd

Type what you want to do in plain English. QuickCmd translates it to a shell command, shows you what it'll run, and asks before executing.

Go AI CLI
View Case Study
Code

ATLAS

Point it at a codebase and watch the architecture appear. A live force-directed graph that shows how your files connect to each other.

JavaScript Visualization Graph
View Case Study
UI/UX

Figma Learning Journal

Three early design sessions — learning Figma from scratch. A hero section, a product card, and a dark landing page.

Figma UI Design Learning
View Case Study
